name: Phone Call
description: Place a real outbound phone call from the Kade-AI phone line on the user's behalf. Capped, recorded, billed to the user's tab.

name: Fal Studio (Video + Design)
description: AI video clips (Kling 3.0 / Veo 3.1 Fast) and design images with perfect text (Seedream 4.5) via fal.ai.

name: Calculator
description: Perform simple and complex mathematical calculations.

name: Flux
description: Generate images using text with the Flux API.

authConfig.label: Your Flux API Key
authConfig.description: Provide your Flux API key from your user profile.

name: Weather
description: Real current weather and forecasts for any city. Free and instant — no key, no cost.

name: Wikipedia
description: Free encyclopedia lookups — people, places, history, science. No key, no cost.

name: Jokes
description: Fresh jokes from a live joke database — clean by default, adult mode for uncensored personas. No key, no cost.

name: News briefing
description: Real headlines from free news feeds — national, world, Springfield/Ozarks local, tech, entertainment, music, sports, or any custom feed. No key, no cost.

name: Read a webpage
description: Reads any link the user shares and returns just the article text — no ads, menus, or clutter. Great for listening. No key, no cost.

name: Adventure save files
description: Persistent save files for text-adventure and RPG games — save, load, and continue games across conversations. No key, no cost.

name: Game Parlor
description: Server-refereed voice games, 19 strong — Blackjack, Uno, War, Go Fish, Wild Eights, In-Between, Cards Against Reality (the fill-in-the-blank party game), Crab Apples, Fill-In Stories, Guess the Sound, Pig, Farkle, Liar's Dice, Trivia Night, Hangman, Word Scramble, Battleship, Tic-Tac-Toe, and Rock Paper Scissors. The engine enforces every rule; the agent just deals the banter. No key, no cost.

name: Send Feedback
description: File a bug report, feature request, or feedback to Kade (the platform owner) on the user's behalf. Free, instant, no cost.

name: Family Messages
description: Take a message for another person on the site ("tell Skylee...") — held and delivered the next time they open a chat or call. Free, no key.
